acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_prose_001] PASS if, after revision, no more than two of the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:27, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:371 still use 'No one answered' or an equivalent flat null-response construction, and each replacement is tied to a concrete focalizer-specific reaction. FAIL if three or more of those beats remain generic silence markers.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after revision, no more than two of the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:27, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:371 still use 'No one answered' or an equivalent flat null-response construction, and each replacement is tied to a concrete focalizer-specific reaction. FAIL if three or more of those beats remain generic silence markers.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:27 uses 'No one answered her'; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:109 repeats 'No one answered'; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241 repeats the same silence beat again; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:371 uses it a fourth time.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same null-response formula four times. In a chapter built around withheld reaction, that exact repetition stops reading as deliberate rhythm and starts reading as placeholder prose, flattening otherwise distinct moments of shock.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace at least two of the silence beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:27, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:371 with focalizer-specific physical or social reactions. The revised lines should show what the silence does to the current consciousness in each moment rather than naming silence in the same generic syntax every time.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
